members.name: debtor-governance

members.deliverable: Implement Todo 13 from .omo/plans/debtor-context-graph-v0.md in an isolated worktree. Commit only owned tests/evidence unless a tiny support fix is explicitly required and reported.

members.name: debtor-docs

members.deliverable: Implement Todo 14 from .omo/plans/debtor-context-graph-v0.md in an isolated worktree. Add operator/developer docs explaining graph model, CLI usage, MCP tools, governance hooks, route status semantics, redaction policy, evidence paths, and known limitations. Do not edit unrelated dirty deployment runbooks. Commit only owned docs/evidence.

members.name: final-eval-pack

Then run real OCR summary-only eval, final MCP tool list, final PII scan, focused tests, evidence summary, and commit only final evidence files.

members.name: final-contract-review

Verify plan compliance, changed-file quality, real OCR summary-only manual QA, MCP path rejection, no raw PII, existing 16+5 tools compatibility, and no out-of-scope deployment mutations. No production edits.
